overview: A Palantir-inspired intelligence platform with five integrated modules: Dashboard, Entity Graph, Investigation Tools, Operational Feed, and Integration Hub. Supports real data connections via CSV uploads, REST API polling, and JSON feed ingestion.
features: KPI dashboard with 30-day incident trend charts
Force-directed entity graph with relationship mapping
Operational feed with incident tracking and anomaly alerts
Integration Hub with CSV upload, REST API polling, and JSON feed ingestion
Mobile-responsive layout with mock/seed data fallback
